div1.entryFree: Furniture, equipment: neither art thou the worse for this poor f. and mean array, Shr. IV, 3, 182 (== dress). I'ld give bay Curtal and his f. All's II, 3, 65 (== trappings). there shalt thou know thy charge, and there receive money and order for their f. H4A III, 3, 226. without discharge, money or f. H6B I, 3, 172. see the barge be ready, and fit it with such f. as suits the greatness of his person, H8 II, 1, 99.
